title: Tracy Lake Trio — Live at the Blues Room
blurb: Experience the soulful sounds of the Tracy Lake Trio as they bring their unique blend of blues and R&B to our stage.

title: Delta Shuffle — Two Sets
blurb: Delta Shuffle delivers an authentic, foot-stomping blues experience with two full sets of their high-energy performance.

title: Memphis Pauline & the Currents
blurb: Memphis Pauline's powerful vocals and the tight rhythms of The Currents promise a night of unforgettable blues and soul.

title: The Blue Note Band — A Night of R&B
blurb: Join us for an evening with The Blue Note Band, serving up smooth R&B grooves and classic blues tunes that will move your soul.

title: Crossroads Collective — Classic Blues
blurb: Crossroads Collective delivers a masterclass in classic blues, honoring the legends with their raw and passionate performance.

title: Harmonica Harry & the Rhythm Kings
blurb: Get ready for an electrifying show as Harmonica Harry and the Rhythm Kings tear up the stage with their incredible blues prowess.

title: Sweet Loretta's Soul Revue
blurb: Sweet Loretta's powerful voice and her Soul Revue band will transport you to a golden era of rhythm and blues.

title: Muddy Waters Tribute Night
blurb: A special tribute night dedicated to the legendary Muddy Waters, performed by a collective of local blues masters.

title: Chicago Blues Experience
blurb: Immerse yourself in the raw energy of the Chicago Blues Experience, delivering gritty and authentic sounds straight from the Windy City.

title: Juke Joint Jesters
blurb: The Juke Joint Jesters bring their infectious rhythms and playful blues to the stage for a night of pure, unadulterated fun.
